notes: Removes visible mushroom images whose stored rights metadata used inadequate Commons-only or “See Wikimedia Commons file page” license wording rather than exact file-page author/license/license-url details.
Clears dropped images from images, images_structured, detail_images, enlarge_images, and list_thumbnail for the affected records.

Keeps affected records visible and safely framed where appropriate; this package changes image exposure only and does not alter edible routing, toxicity status, source-review decisions, or route/classifier code.
Targets ghost-bolete, leccinum-insolens, leccinum-insolens-var-brunneo-maculatum, charcoal-burners-mild-flexible-gill-russulas, and hemileccinum-subglabripes.
